content: Hey, I'm Shiloh, nice to meet you. I've been really busy lately with work at the restaurant and my new YouTube channel.
Nice to meet you too, Shiloh! Congratulations on the new YouTube channel. What kind of content are you planning to create?
Thanks! I'm really passionate about pastry-making, so I'll be sharing recipes and tips. I've also been getting into beekeeping, which is a great way to relax after a long day in the kitchen.
That sounds amazing! I've heard beekeeping can be very therapeutic. Do you have a favorite type of pastry to make?
Definitely croissants. There's something about the layers of dough that I find really satisfying to work with. I've been experimenting with different flavors, like matcha and strawberry.
Mmm, those sound delicious. I've heard matcha can be a bit tricky to work with, but it's definitely a popular flavor right now. What inspired you to start your YouTube channel?

I've just always loved sharing my knowledge with others, and I thought it would be a great way to connect with people who are interested in pastry-making. Plus, it's a fun way to document my recipes and experiments.
That's really great. So, what's a typical day like for you? Do you have a set routine or schedule?

Well, I usually wake up around 5am and head to the restaurant to start prepping for the day. We're a Michelin-starred restaurant, so there's always a lot of pressure to perform. After my shift, I like to unwind with some pottery or a board game.
Wow, 5am is early! But it's great that you have some relaxing activities to look forward to after work. Do you have any favorite board games or pottery projects that you're working on?
Actually, I'm really into Rust programming right now, and I've been working on a few projects in my free time. It's been a great way to challenge myself and learn new skills.
That's really cool. I've heard Rust is a great language to learn, especially for systems programming. Are you working on any specific projects that you're excited about?
Yeah, I'm actually building a small aquarium in my living room, and I'm using Rust to create a custom controller for the lighting and temperature systems.

That sounds like a really fun project. I've always been fascinated by aquariums, and it's great that you're using your programming skills to create something unique. Do you have any fish or other animals in your aquarium yet?
Not yet, but I'm planning to get some soon. I've been doing a lot of research on different species and their care requirements. It's been really interesting to learn about all the different options.
I'm sure it will be a great hobby once you get started. So, what's next for your YouTube channel? Do you have any big plans or collaborations coming up?
Actually, I'm planning to collaborate with a few other chefs and food bloggers in the next few months. We're going to be doing a series of videos on different types of cuisine and cooking techniques.

That sounds like a great idea. I'm sure your audience will love the variety and expertise that you'll be bringing to the table. Do you have any favorite types of cuisine or cooking techniques that you're looking forward to exploring?
Definitely. I've always been a fan of Japanese cuisine, and I'm excited to explore some of the different regional specialties and ingredients.

Japanese cuisine is amazing. I've heard the attention to detail and presentation is really unique and beautiful. Do you have any plans to travel to Japan or explore other culinary destinations in the near future?

Actually, I'm hoping to take a trip to Japan next year to visit some of the famous pastry shops and learn from other chefs. It's been a dream of mine for a long time, and I think it will be a really inspiring experience.
That sounds like an amazing adventure. I'm sure you'll learn a lot and bring back some new ideas and inspiration for your YouTube channel and restaurant work.
